goal: Complete the kanban web viewer at scripts/kanban-viewer.html. The file already has HTML scaffold and JSON loader. Read it first, then add missing features: 1) Recursive tree renderer for DAG nodes showing id/description/status/cost/commit 2) Status colors: done=green running=blue pending=gray failed=red 3) Summary bar at top 4) Auto-refresh every 3s 5) Drag-and-drop kanban.json 6) Dark theme 7) Collapsible subtrees.

tree.description: Verify existing recursive tree renderer correctly handles arbitrary DAG depth and displays id/description/status/cost/commit fields
Verify status color mapping (done=green, running=blue, pending=gray, failed=red) is correct in CSS and applied via status-badge classes
Verify summary bar renders total/done/running/pending/failed/cost from kanban data.summary
Verify auto-refresh polls every 3s, toggle checkbox starts/stops it, and green dot indicator reflects state
Verify drag-and-drop of kanban.json loads and renders the file, disabling auto-refresh on drop
Verify dark theme CSS variables produce a cohesive dark UI with proper contrast ratios
Verify collapsible subtrees toggle children visibility on header click with chevron rotation animation
